support.title: Support
support.hoursBody: All week from 8 am to 11pm GMT+3
support.faq1a: To send money, click the "Send Money" button on your dashboard, enter the amount and select currencies, choose a recipient, make payment using the displayed method, and confirm your transaction.
support.faq2a: We charge absolutely no fees on any transaction. Send money worldwide completely free with Ciuna.
support.faq3a: All transactions are completed within minutes, ensuring your money reaches its destination quickly and efficiently.

send.noCurrencies: No currencies available. Please contact support.
send.sendMoneyHeroSubtitle: Choose amount and currencies to start your transfer.
send.selectCurrencyFirst: Please select a currency first to see the required fields
send.addRecipientHint: Add a new recipient to get started
send.sendMoneyCompleteHint: Send money to complete your transfer
send.scanQrBanking: Scan QR code with your mobile banking app
send.stablecoinMissingAddress: Wallet address is missing. Contact support.
send.scanWalletQr: Scan the QR code with your crypto wallet and confirm the network matches before sending.
send.payMobileMoney: Send the payment via mobile money to the name and number shown above.
send.failedAddRecipient: Failed to add recipient. Please try again.
send.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 5MB
send.fileTypeInvalid: Only JPG, PNG, and PDF files are allowed
send.failedCreateTxn: Failed to create transaction. Please try again.
send.emailVerificationBody: Please verify your email address before you can send money. We've sent a verification link to {{email}}.
send.emailVerificationCheck: Check your email and click the verification link to continue.
send.resendVerificationSuccess: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.
send.resendVerificationFailed: Failed to send verification email. Please try again.
send.fulfillmentErrorOutsideBank: This receive amount is outside the range allowed for bank transfer on this corridor. Adjust the amount or add a cash window in admin / contact support.
send.fulfillmentErrorOverlap: This receive amount matches both bank and cash rules. Corridor settings should use disjoint ranges — contact support.
send.fulfillmentErrorGap: This receive amount is not eligible for this corridor. Adjust the amount.
send.cashHandBanner: For this amount, funds will be delivered as cash to the address you select (not by bank transfer).
send.logisticsFeeHintPercent: {{pct}}% of what the recipient receives (added to your send total)
send.addDeliveryHint: Add an address above to continue
send.failedAddDelivery: Could not save delivery address. Try again.

recipients.failedDeleteLinked: Failed to delete — linked to a transaction
recipients.emptyAddHint: Add your first recipient to get started
recipients.selectCurrencyFirst: Please select a currency first to see the required fields

referrals.subtitle: Share your link and track rewards when friends send money.
referrals.commissionRulesHint: The more friends you refer and they complete transactions, the higher your commission rate!
referrals.commissionRulesExample: Example: a completed $100 transaction at 0.5% earns you $0.50.
referrals.payoutInstructions: Choose a saved recipient and amount. Our team will process the transfer. Available: {{available}}
referrals.errRecipientAmount: Choose a recipient and enter an amount.
referrals.errAmountPositive: Enter an amount greater than zero.
referrals.errAmountExceeds: That amount is more than your available balance ({{balance}}). Enter a lower amount.
referrals.programPaused: The referral program is paused. Check back later.
referrals.programPercent: Earn {{pct}}% on each referred user's completed transactions for {{months}} months from their first transaction on Ciuna.
referrals.programTier: Earn tiered commission on each referred user's completed transactions for {{months}} months from their first transaction on Ciuna.
referrals.programThreshold: Earn {{reward}} when each referral sends a combined {{threshold}} or more in completed transactions on Ciuna.
referrals.shareMessagePrefix: Use my link to sign up and send money between 10+ African countries and Russia for free on Ciuna:

profile.title: Your profile
profile.baseCurrencyHint: Used for reporting your total sent amount
profile.deleteNotImplemented: Account deletion is not yet implemented
profile.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please try again.
profile.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone. All your data, transactions, and account information will be permanently deleted.

verification.hubSubtitle: Complete identity and address verification for compliance.
verification.infoKyc: Please complete KYC Identity and Address information for compliance.
verification.placeholderFullName: Enter your full name as it appears on your ID
verification.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 10MB
verification.fileTypeInvalid: Only JPG, PNG, and PDF files are allowed
verification.fillAllFields: Please fill in all fields and upload a file
verification.identityLocked: Your identity verification is already under review or approved. You cannot upload a new document.
verification.addressLocked: Your address verification is already under review or approved. You cannot upload a new document.
verification.identityInReview: Your KYC identity information is in review. We will provide an update account soonest. Please check your email for updates.
verification.identityPendingNote: Your submission is pending review. You can update it below.
verification.addressInReview: Your KYC address information is in review. We will provide an update account soonest. Please check your email for updates.

auth.resendFailed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
